title: Build MAP Risk System (risk register, classes, escalation)
description: Per Guidelines/MAP_repo_systems_gap_review.md secondary gap: Risk (review severity, security second-pass, current-state health issues, improvement backlog, constraints) is present but scattered. Build MAP_System/RISK_SYSTEM.md defining risk classes, risk severity, risk register format, risk owners, risk review cadence, risk escalation, and risk acceptance. Build MAP_System/templates/RISK_REGISTER_TEMPLATE.md. Must cross-link Self-Repair (BLOCKING/STRUCTURAL repairs are risk-bearing), Decision/Authority (risk acceptance is itself a decision needing the right authority tier), and Human Interface (risks surfaced on dashboard). Depends on TASK-110 (shared decisions.md/current-state.md touch point); do not submit until TASK-110 is released. Register all output_paths upfront.
acceptance_criteria: MAP_System/RISK_SYSTEM.md exists and defines risk classes, severity, register format, owners, review cadence, escalation, and acceptance
RISK_SYSTEM.md cross-links SELF_REPAIR_SYSTEM.md, DECISION_AUTHORITY_SYSTEM.md, and HUMAN_INTERFACE_SYSTEM.md
shared/decisions.md gets a new DECISION entry recording Risk System adoption
events/events.jsonl has PROGRESS/SUBMISSION entries tracing the build
